expectations.text: Says Intake should fetch/read the GitHub issue title or body before classification
expectations.evidence: The GitHub issue title/body is the authoritative WORK_ITEM, and the supplied issue remains the Phase 1 parent issue; do not create a new parent issue. For Phase 1 Intake, fetch ISSUE 42 first, infer the work item from its title/body, classify it, assign a `YYYY-MM-DD-<kebab-title>` slug, create `.coding-workflow/work/<slug>/`, write `00-intake.md` from the intake template, and record the issue number/node ID with a comment linking the intake artifact. Here, the work item should be the CSV import bug that silently drops rows; `WORK_ITEM: maybe clean up auth later` is supplemental only and must not override the issue.
